---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the OSS collector, schema, monitoring workflow, or reference API
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What downstream use case or workflow is currently hard to support?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or interface you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain who benefits from the change:

- aviation research
- flight-planning prototypes
- drone or UAM tooling
- airport operations dashboards
- other downstream integrations

## Data Or Safety Considerations

Call out any source-system, validation, compliance, or safety concerns that should be considered before implementation.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or prior art.
